ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of Inventory & Appraisal; Petition For Final Distribution Or Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration
Off Calendar Nov-19-2014 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of Inventory & Appraisal; Petition For Final Distribution Or Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration
Off Calendar Oct-08-2014 Continued To Nov-19-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Michael Rubenstein for Nana Meyer (Executor). Robert Elliott for Robert Wright (Parent of two Beneficiaries who are minors).

Mr. Rubenstein stated that the inventory was kicked back, that he has the original and is prepared to file it and proposed a six week continuance stating at which time he will have the accounting on file. Mr. Elliott stated that he agrees to a continuance and that they selected a date of November 19th. Status on filing of the inventory and appraisal, petition for final distribution or petition for approval of report on status of administration was continued to November 19, 2014 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Peter Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. McConico. (Not Reported)

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of Inventory & Appraisal; Petition For Final Distribution Or Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration
Off Calendar Sep-10-2014 Continued To Oct-08-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Michael Rubenstein for Nana Meyer.

Mr. Rubenstein stated that he has a stipulation with Counsel to put the matter over. Status on filing of the inventory and appraisal, petition for final distribution or petition for approval of report on status of administration was continued to October 8, 2014 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. McConico. (Not Reported)
